name: Network Intrusion Detection
description: Built a Network Intrusion Detection System using IBM watsonx.ai AutoAI to train and compare ML models on the NSL-KDD dataset. The best-performing model was deployed via a Streamlit dashboard that visualises live traffic classifications in real time.

name: Customer Shopping Behavior Analysis
description: Performed end-to-end exploratory data analysis on a retail transactions dataset. Uncovered purchase patterns, seasonal trends, and customer segments using Python (Pandas, NumPy) and visualised findings in an interactive Tableau dashboard.

links.demo: [PLACEHOLDER: demo url for Customer Shopping Behavior project]

name: Geldium AI Collections System
description: Designed an AI-powered debt collections strategy for a fictional fintech, Geldium, as part of the Tata GenAI Data Analytics simulation. Delivered a comprehensive case study and PowerPoint deck covering propensity modelling, ethical AI guardrails, and KPI frameworks.
